# Bonardi Construction, Inc.

> Family-owned general contractor serving Queens, Brooklyn, Nassau County, and Long Island, New York for over 30 years. Led by owner Gary M. Bonelli, the company delivers residential and commercial construction: asphalt paving, masonry, roofing, concrete, home additions, demolition, restoration, and more. Licensed and insured — NYC Lic #1274180, Nassau #H0446880000, Suffolk #57853-H. Phone: 718.762.3400.

Bonardi Construction handles projects end to end: estimates, DOB permits, construction, and final inspection. Free quotes are available through the contact page or by phone.

## Company

- [About](https://www.bonardiconst.com/about): Company history, values, and approach
- [Gary M. Bonelli](https://www.bonardiconst.com/gary-m-bonelli): Owner and founder profile
- [Contact](https://www.bonardiconst.com/contact-us): Request a free quote — 718.762.3400
- [Areas We Serve](https://www.bonardiconst.com/areas-we-serve): Queens, Brooklyn, Nassau County, and Suffolk County service areas

## Services

- [All Services](https://www.bonardiconst.com/services): Full directory of residential, exterior/site work, and commercial services
- [Asphalt Services](https://www.bonardiconst.com/services/asphalt): Paving, milling, and sealcoating for driveways and parking lots
- [Masonry & Brick Pointing](https://www.bonardiconst.com/services/masonry-brick-pointing): Tuckpointing, restoration, and repair
- [Roofing Services](https://www.bonardiconst.com/services/roofing-services): Installation, repair, and replacement
- [Concrete & Blacktop](https://www.bonardiconst.com/services/concrete): Foundations, driveways, and walkways
- [Home Additions & Extensions](https://www.bonardiconst.com/services/home-additions-extensions): Custom additions, dormers, and extensions
- [Kitchen Remodeling](https://www.bonardiconst.com/services/kitchen-remodeling): Full-service kitchen renovations
- [Construction Management](https://www.bonardiconst.com/services/construction-management): End-to-end commercial project oversight
- [Demolition](https://www.bonardiconst.com/services/demolition): Selective and full-site demolition
- [Fire Damage Restoration](https://www.bonardiconst.com/services/fire-damage-restoration): Assessment, demolition, and rebuild after fire damage

- [Project Gallery](https://www.bonardiconst.com/gallery): Photos of completed residential and commercial work
